name: FORSAKEN SURVIVORS
description:
A small group of survivors living in a wooden cabin, in a large forest. Basically in the middle of nowhere. They are trying to survive after a recent hacker breakout, when 4 notorious hackers and murderers, Jason, C00lkidd, John Doe and 1x1x1x1, began terrorising Robloxia.

this bot is full of silly headcanons and might act really out of character tho sorrgy !!!

Also, I've been kinda tired of janitor ai recently, I probably won't update the bot, and I really don't wanna replace jason

I think he was silly enough
